original_ad_name: Las Vegas Promo | V2 | Pattern page | Copy with inclusions
primary_text:
Adventure awaits! When you buy 4 BFGoodrich KO3 tyres, you’ll enter to win a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Las Vegas 🎉

Trip inclusions:
✅ One-Day MINT 400 VIP+ Tickets
✅ Bronco Roadeo Tour
✅ Grand Canyon Helicopter Experience
✅ $2,000 AUD spending allowance

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Online tyre service — Rhonda
headline: Win A Trip to Las Vegas!
